stash.title: Stash
stash.heroSubtitle: Capture inspiration at a click. Search for it with ideas, not keywords
stash.step2Desc: Search for exactly what you mean
stash.step3Desc: Browse and export the best results
stash.grid1Desc: Looking for 'warm sunset gradients' or 'minimalist product photography'? Just type it. No titling or tagging needed.
stash.grid2Desc: 3x smaller than similar applications, and runs in the background without hogging resources.
stash.grid3Desc: Everything runs locally. The AI, the search, the storage – it's all on your computer.
stash.ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No account. No catch
